fields.Name: BYO T01 - Counter Increments On Click
fields.Description: Navigates to the counter page, clicks the '+1' button three times, and verifies the displayed count went UP. Demonstrates the regression suite catching a broken counter — the BYO app intentionally decrements on click instead, so this test is expected to FAIL when the suite is run against the buggy app.

InputDefinition.goal: Open the page at {{baseUrl}}/counter. The page shows a counter (currently 0) and a button labeled '+1'. Click the '+1' button three times. After three clicks, the counter MUST display 3. If it displays anything other than 3 (e.g., -3, 0, or any negative number), the test goal has NOT been met. Report the final count you observed.

judgeValidationCriteria: The counter displays the value 3 (not -3, 0, or any other value)
The +1 button was clicked exactly three times
The counter went UP with each click, not down
